text: The U.S. has quietly warned some European allies to expect delays in weapons deliveries because the Iran war is draining U.S. stockpiles. The Pentagon is prioritizing its own needs and ongoing operations. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 美国已悄悄警告一些欧洲盟友，由于伊朗战争正在消耗美国的库存，武器交付可能会出现延迟。五角大楼正在优先考虑自身需求和正在进行的行动。来源：路透社

text: 📸 U.S. sailors on the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier are reporting poor-quality food and small portions during a long deployment near Iran. Because of extended operations and strained supply lines, crews are relying on limited resupply at sea, leading to rationing and lower morale. Families say sailors are often hungry, and mail disruptions mean they can’t send extra food or supplies. Source: USA Today
text_zh: 📸 在伊朗附近长期部署期间，美国“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号航空母舰上的水兵报告称食物质量差且分量少。由于行动延长和补给线紧张，船员们只能依赖有限的海上补给，导致配给制和士气低落。家属们表示，水兵们经常挨饿，而邮件中断意味着他们无法寄送额外的食物或补给。来源：《今日美国》

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel TRUMP: 'The out of control Trump Hating, Washington, D.C. District Court Judge, who doesn't want to accept a $400 Million Dollar GIFT of one of the most beautiful Ballrooms anywhere in the World, desperately needed by the White House and its future Presidents (Due to time constraints, I will barely get to use it!), wants me to build the "underground" portion of the Ballroom, without the "above ground" portion, but the underground doesn't work, isn't necessary, and would indeed be useless, without the above ground sections. The underground portion is wedded to, and serves, the upper portion, including the Bomb Shelters, a State of the Art Hospital and Medical Facilities, Protective Partitioning, Top Secret Military Installations, Structures, and Equipment, Protective Missile Resistant Steel, Columns, Roofs, and Beams, Drone Proof Ceilings and Roofs, Military Grade Venting, and Bullet, Ballistic, and Blast Proof Glass. It's all tied together as one big, expensive, and very complex unit, which is vital for National Security and Military Operations of the United States of America! The Judge's decision, which doesn't even discuss the vital subject of STANDING, of which the plaintiff has none, severely jeopardizes the lives and welfare of the people who work, and will be working, at the White House — including all future Presidents of the United States, and their families. President DONALD J. TRUMP' tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel TRUMP：“这位失控的、仇恨特朗普的华盛顿特区地方法官，不想接受一份价值4亿美元的礼物——世界上最美丽的宴会厅之一，而白宫及其未来的总统们迫切需要它（由于时间紧迫，我几乎没机会使用它！），他想让我建造宴会厅的‘地下’部分，而不建造‘地上’部分。但如果没有地上部分，地下部分根本无法运作，也没有必要，实际上毫无用处。地下部分与地上部分紧密相连并为其服务，包括防空洞、最先进的医院和医疗设施、防护隔断、绝密军事设施、结构和设备、防导弹防护钢、立柱、屋顶和横梁、防无人机天花板和屋顶、军用级通风系统，以及防弹、防爆玻璃。这一切都被整合为一个庞大、昂贵且非常复杂的整体，这对美利坚合众国的国家安全和军事行动至关重要！法官的裁决甚至没有讨论原告根本不具备的‘诉讼资格’这一关键问题，严重危及在白宫工作及未来将要工作的人员的生命和福利——包括所有未来的美国总统及其家人。——唐纳德·J·特朗普总统”的推文

text: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇵🇦 BREAKING | China has told Danish shipping group Maersk and Switzerland-based Mediterranean ​Shipping Company (MSC Shipping) to cease operating ports ‌on the Panama Canal, the Financial Times reported on Wednesday. In a meeting with China's state planner last month, ​Maersk and MSC Shipping were told to ​withdraw from the Balboa and Cristóbal ports ⁠immediately, the report said, citing two people ​familiar with the talks. Maersk and MSC were told not to "engage ​in illegal activities that harm the interests of Chinese companies, ‌and ⁠to uphold commercial ethics and international rules," the report said. Panama has granted temporary 18-month concessions to keep the terminals operating, with APM Terminals, a unit ​of Maersk, ​managing Balboa ⁠and TIL Panama, a unit of MSC, handling Cristobal. CK Hutchison has faced heavy ​criticism from China since unveiling a ​plan ⁠in March 2025 to sell 43 ports in 23 countries, including the Balboa and Cristóbal ports, ⁠to ​a group led by BlackRock ​and Italian Gianluigi Aponte's family-run shipping firm MSC. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇵🇦 突发 | 据《金融时报》周三报道，中国已告知丹麦航运集团马士基（Maersk）和总部位于瑞士的地中海航运公司（MSC Shipping）停止运营巴拿马运河的港口。报道援引两名知情人士的话称，在上个月与中国国家规划部门的会议上，马士基和MSC航运被告知立即撤出巴尔博亚（Balboa）和克里斯托瓦尔（Cristobal）港口。报道称，马士基和MSC被告知不要“从事损害中国公司利益的非法活动，并遵守商业道德和国际规则”。巴拿马已给予18个月的临时特许权以维持码头运营，马士基旗下的APM码头公司管理巴尔博亚港，MSC旗下的TIL巴拿马公司管理克里斯托瓦尔港。自2025年3月公布计划将23个国家的43个港口（包括巴尔博亚和克里斯托瓦尔港）出售给由贝莱德（BlackRock）和意大利吉安路易吉·阿蓬特（Gianluigi Aponte）家族经营的航运公司MSC领导的财团以来，长江和记实业（CK Hutchison）一直面临中国的严厉批评。通过我们查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: ELINT News RT @ChristopherHale : NEW: Speaker Mike Johnson told reporters today that Pope Leo XIV doesn't understand “something called the just war doctrine.” Pope Leo is an Augustinian friar who spent twelve years leading Augustine’s religious order. Augustine invented the doctrine. https://www.thelettersfromleo.com/p/something-called-the-just-war-doctrine tweet

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf on the ceasefire: "The ceasefire was nothing but a result of Hezbollah's steadfastness and the unity of the Axis of Resistance; and we will deal with this ceasefire with caution, and we will remain together until the full realization of victory. I thank the mediating efforts of the State of Pakistan and General Asim Munir for endorsing this ceasefire. We are true to our pledge..." tweet

text: Visioner 🇩🇪 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Germany has signaled it is ready to deploy minesweepers to the Strait of Hormuz, but only as part of a potential international mission. The issue is expected to be discussed on Friday in Paris, where Merz is set to meet Macron, Starmer and Meloni. According to a German government official, the federal government is "prepared to make a German contribution to ensuring freedom of navigation." That could include "mine clearance or maritime reconnaissance." Conditions: a stable ceasefire, a mandate within a system of collective security — "preferably" from the United Nations — and formal approval by both the federal government and the Bundestag. Merz underlined that Berlin remains "far away" from such a decision. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇩🇪 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 突发 | 德国已表示准备向霍尔木兹海峡部署扫雷舰，但仅作为潜在国际任务的一部分。预计周五在巴黎讨论此问题，届时默茨（Merz）将与马克龙、斯塔默和梅洛尼会面。据一位德国政府官员称，联邦政府“准备为确保航行自由做出德国的贡献”。这可能包括“扫雷或海上侦察”。条件是：稳定的停火，在集体安全体系内的授权——“最好”来自联合国——以及联邦政府和联邦议院的正式批准。默茨强调，柏林距离做出这样的决定还“很遥远”。通过我们查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: The person who filed the meritless and lawless suit on the desperately needed White House Ballroom, being built as a GIFT to America (without Tax Dollars!), a woman walking her dog, has absolutely NO STANDING to bring such a monumentally important case against our Country. The Trump Hating Judge’s opinion is radically different from his first opinion, that was issued weeks ago, while still being unlawful and ambiguous, which never even addressed her COMPLETE lack of Standing. Every Political “Pundit” has said this case is meritless, even a JOKE, but it’s not a joke to me, or the people of America. Too much hard work, time, and money spent in order that a Judge can claim that he ruled against “DONALD TRUMP,” something which I have gotten very used to, BUT WILL NOT ACCEPT! President DJT tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：那个对急需的白宫宴会厅提起毫无根据且无法律依据诉讼的人——该宴会厅是作为给美国的礼物（未使用纳税人的钱！）建造的——一个遛狗的女人，根本没有资格对我们的国家提起如此重大的诉讼。这位憎恨特朗普的法官的意见与他几周前发布的第一个意见截然不同，而且仍然是非法和模棱两可的，甚至从未提及她完全缺乏诉讼资格。每一位政治“权威人士”都说这个案件毫无根据，甚至是个笑话，但这对我或美国人民来说不是笑话。为了让法官声称他裁定反对“唐纳德·特朗普”，投入了太多的辛勤工作、时间和金钱，这是我非常习惯的事情，但我绝不会接受！总统 DJT 推文

text: Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🚀 🇺🇸 The U.S. Missile Defense Agency has awarded Northrop Grumman an additional contract modification to accelerate the development of the Glide Phase Interceptor (GPI) hypersonic interceptor. The value of the agreement is $475.3 million, bringing the total contract amount to $1.31 billion. The revised contract sets an accelerated development timeline, with a target completion date of June 2028. The GPI interceptor is designed to engage hypersonic glide vehicles during their glide phase, when they are no longer powered by engines. This phase occurs after separation from the booster and before the final descent toward the target. It is particularly challenging due to the weapon’s high speed and maneuverability. Video Made Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @StatWatch25：🚀 🇺🇸 美国导弹防御局已授予诺斯罗普·格鲁曼公司额外的合同修改，以加速滑翔阶段拦截器 (GPI) 高超音速拦截器的开发。该协议价值4.753亿美元，使合同总额达到13.1亿美元。修订后的合同设定了加速开发时间表，目标完成日期为2028年6月。GPI拦截器旨在在高超音速滑翔飞行器处于滑翔阶段（即不再由发动机提供动力时）对其进行拦截。这一阶段发生在与助推器分离后、向目标进行最后下降之前。由于该武器的高速度和机动性，这一阶段极具挑战性。视频由 Grok AI 制作 推文

text: WarMonitor This refers to a string of mysterious deaths and disappearances of U.S. scientists tied to advanced nuclear, aerospace, and defense research, fueling speculation of a possible connection. Doocy: There are at least ten missing scientists with access to classified material Trump: I hope it’s random. We’re going to know in the next week and a half. Doocy: It is possible a foreign adversary is in the US scooping people up. Trump: Well, Biden had open borders. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2044845141161341095/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这指的是一系列与先进核、航空航天和国防研究相关的美国科学家神秘死亡和失踪事件，引发了可能存在关联的猜测。杜西：至少有十名接触过机密材料的科学家失踪。特朗普：我希望这只是随机事件。我们会在未来一周半内知道。杜西：有可能是一个外国对手在美国抓人。特朗普：嗯，拜登实行了开放边境政策。 https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2044845141161341095/video/1 - Acyn 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW 🔴 The IDF says it is preparing for a surge in Hezbollah rocket attacks on northern Israel ahead of the expected ceasefire. tweet

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @ChristopherJM : Russia is readying a fresh offensive in SE Ukraine, dipping into its strategic reserve to add 20,000 fresh troops to its force inside the country, Ukraine's GUR military intel told me. With some 680,000 soldiers now on the ground, Russia aims to take the Donbas by September. https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816?syn-25a6b1a6=1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转推 @ChristopherJM：乌克兰军事情报局（GUR）告诉我，俄罗斯正在乌克兰东南部准备新的攻势，动用其战略预备队，向该国境内的部队增派了2万名新兵。目前在地面上有约68万名士兵，俄罗斯的目标是在9月前占领顿巴斯。 https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816?syn-25a6b1a6=1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "Five rockets were fired at Nahariya, four of which were intercepted, and the rest hit open areas, per the IDF. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The IDF stated that some 10 rockets were fired toward Karmiel, eight of which were intercepted, and the "rest hit open areas." @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 WSJ: The grandson of Raul Castro attempted to contact the White House through back channels by tapping a wealthy Havana businessman to pass along a letter last week, reportedly directly to U.S. President Trump. The letter was similar to an official one, even carrying the official Cuban seal, and proposed oppotunities for U.S. investment and economic agreements Cuba along with sanctions relief. The letter courier, Roberto Carlos Chamizo González, was stopped at Miami International Airport and the letter confiscated, ending the effort. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 《华尔街日报》：劳尔·卡斯特罗的孙子试图通过幕后渠道联系白宫，他上周指派了一名哈瓦那富商转交一封信，据报道是直接转交给美国总统特朗普。这封信看起来像是一封正式信函，甚至带有古巴官方印章，信中提议美国在古巴进行投资和达成经济协议，并要求解除制裁。信使罗伯托·卡洛斯·查米佐·冈萨雷斯在迈阿密国际机场被拦截，信件被没收，此次尝试随之告终。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has called on residents not to return to targeted areas in southern Lebanon, the Bekaa and Beirut’s southern suburbs until the situation becomes fully clear following the ceasefire announcement. The group acknowledged the desire to return home and praised the people’s patience and steadfastness, but urged restraint out of concern for their safety. It promised that residents would return with heads held high, as always. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党呼吁居民在停火声明发布后，在局势完全明朗之前，不要返回黎巴嫩南部、贝卡谷地和贝鲁特南郊的目标区域。该组织承认人们渴望回家，并赞扬了民众的耐心和坚定，但出于安全考虑，敦促大家保持克制。它承诺，居民们将像往常一样昂首挺胸地回家。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 U.S. Department of State: Israel shall preserve its right to take all necessary measures in self-defense, at any time, against PLANNED, IMMINENT*, or ongoing attacks. This shall not be impeded by the cessation of hostilities. Besides this, it will…" 🇮🇱 "We remain in Lebanon in a reinforced security zone... we are not leaving." - Netanyahu 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 美国国务院：以色列应保留在任何时候针对已计划、迫在眉睫*或正在进行的袭击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。这不应受到敌对行动停止的影响。除此之外，它将……” 🇮🇱 “我们仍留在黎巴嫩的一个强化安全区内……我们不会离开。” - 内塔尼亚胡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 U.S. Department of State: Israel shall preserve its right to take all necessary measures in self-defense, at any time, against PLANNED, IMMINENT*, or ongoing attacks. This shall not be impeded by the cessation of hostilities. Besides this, it will not carry out any offensive military operations against Lebanese targets, including civilian, military, and other state targets, in the territory of Lebanon by land, air, and sea. The Government of Lebanon will take meaningful steps to prevent Hezbollah and all other rogue non-state armed groups in the territory of Lebanon from carrying out any attacks, operations, or hostile activities against Israeli targets. *This means there is no ceasefire and Israel can attack Lebanon because of vibes. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 美国国务院：以色列应保留在任何时候针对已计划、迫在眉睫*或正在进行的袭击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。这不应受到敌对行动停止的影响。除此之外，它不会在黎巴嫩领土上通过陆、海、空对黎巴嫩目标（包括平民、军事和其他国家目标）进行任何进攻性军事行动。黎巴嫩政府将采取有意义的措施，防止真主党及黎巴嫩领土上的所有其他流氓非国家武装团体对以色列目标进行任何袭击、行动或敌对活动。*这意味着并没有真正的停火，以色列可以因为“感觉”而攻击黎巴嫩。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
